## Lane

- [ ] Engine (`app/api/**`, `lib/engine/**`)
- [ ] Screen (`app/page.tsx`, `app/globals.css`, `components/screen/**`)
- [ ] Shared contract (`lib/contracts/**`, `lib/mock.ts`)
- [ ] Integration/docs

## How to verify

1. 

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the issue this closes.
- [ ] I stayed inside the selected lane, or explained the cross-lane change.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Mock mode and the fallback still work.
- [ ] Contract changes update types, mock data, API producer, and screen consumer.
- [ ] No secret or `.env.local` value is included.
- [ ] I requested both builders for shared-contract or integration changes.
